notes: Auditor findings accumulated one domain at a time (waves of <=3), audited independently against the rulebook without seeing the answer key. Domains completed: STO, ROU, IDE, LED, FX, TIM, AGG, TAX, API, TST (all 10). Each auditor was scoped to the fixture files where its domain lives (not a cold full-repo scan), so this recall is a per-domain-scoped number.

findings.evidence: parse_amount(input: str) -> float: return float(input), money parsed into a binary float
findings.fix: parse straight into Decimal(input), never float

findings.evidence: to_minor_units(amount: float) -> int: round(amount * 100), money held and computed as float
findings.fix: accept Decimal or int cents, do exact arithmetic

findings.evidence: from_minor_units(minor: int) -> float: minor / 100, returns a float money value
findings.fix: return Decimal, e.g. Decimal(minor) / 100

findings.evidence: round_money(value: float) -> float: round(value, 2), money typed and rounded as float
findings.fix: operate on Decimal with quantize and an explicit rounding mode

findings.evidence: to_decimal(amount: float) -> Decimal: return Decimal(amount), Decimal built directly from a float, freezing the float error
findings.fix: Decimal(str(amount)), or never take a float and parse to Decimal at the boundary

findings.evidence: float(input) parses the amount to float first, precision lost at the float() call before any Decimal wraps it
findings.fix: parse external input directly into Decimal(input)

findings.evidence: round(amount * 100) hardcodes 100 as the minor-unit multiplier for every currency (breaks JPY exp 0, BHD exp 3)
findings.fix: scale by 10**exponent from an ISO 4217 currency table, not a literal 100

findings.evidence: minor / 100 hardcodes a 2-decimal divisor for all currencies
findings.fix: divide by 10**exponent looked up per currency

findings.evidence: round(value, 2) assumes exactly 2 fractional digits for every currency
findings.fix: round to the currency ISO 4217 minor-unit exponent, not a literal 2

findings.evidence: subtotal DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, money stored as binary float
findings.fix: use NUMERIC(19,4) or integer minor units

findings.evidence: tax DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, money stored as binary float
findings.fix: use NUMERIC(19,4)

findings.evidence: total DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, money stored as binary float
findings.fix: use NUMERIC(19,4)

findings.evidence: unit_price REAL NOT NULL, unit price stored as binary float
findings.fix: use NUMERIC(19,4) with guard digits for sub-cent prices

findings.evidence: amount DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL (payments), payment amount as double
findings.fix: use NUMERIC(19,4) or BIGINT minor units

findings.evidence: amount DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL (webhook_events), credited amount as double
findings.fix: use NUMERIC(19,4)

findings.evidence: amount DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL (ledger_entries), ledger entry amount as double
findings.fix: use NUMERIC(19,4), a ledger must be exact

findings.evidence: balance NUMERIC(6,2), a running account balance accumulator caps at 9999.99 and overflows
findings.fix: size precision for the largest total, e.g. NUMERIC(19,4)

findings.evidence: accounts.balance has no adjacent currency column, every balance is a bare number with no unit
findings.fix: add currency_code CHAR(3) (ISO 4217) per row

findings.evidence: invoices subtotal, tax, total have no currency column alongside the amounts
findings.fix: add a currency_code column to invoices

findings.evidence: payments.amount has no currency column
findings.fix: add currency_code to payments

findings.evidence: webhook_events.amount has no currency column
findings.fix: add currency_code to webhook_events

findings.evidence: ledger_entries.amount has no currency column
findings.fix: add currency_code to ledger_entries

findings.evidence: round_money: round(value, 2) on a binary float, banker's default plus float-repr bug, the whole service's money-rounding path
findings.fix: quantize a Decimal from a string with an explicit mode

findings.evidence: to_minor_units: round(amount * 100) with no explicit mode converting a float to cents
findings.fix: quantize a Decimal from the string amount, then to int minor units

findings.evidence: to_decimal: Decimal(amount) built from a binary float, the exact type inherits the float error
findings.fix: Decimal(str(amount))

findings.evidence: split_proportionally rounds each share independently in a comprehension, no residual reconciliation, parts do not sum to total
findings.fix: largest-remainder allocation in integer minor units

findings.evidence: bundle_line_total multiplies an already-rounded per-unit price back by quantity, round-then-scale
findings.fix: round the bundle total once, never pre-round the per-unit figure

findings.evidence: unit_price_from_bundle rounds bundle_total / quantity, that rounded intermediate is fed into the multiply
findings.fix: carry full precision, round once at the boundary

findings.evidence: invoice_total rounds the discounted subtotal then rounds the taxed amount, chained intermediate rounding on top of a per-line rounded subtotal
findings.fix: carry full Decimal precision through discount then tax, quantize once at settlement

findings.evidence: handle_payment_succeeded credits on every delivery, no event-id dedup before the side effect, _received_events appended after and never checked
findings.fix: insert event id with ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING in the same txn, skip if present

findings.evidence: charge_customer POSTs to /v1/charges in a retry loop with no Idempotency-Key header, each retry is a fresh charge
findings.fix: mint one idempotency key per charge, persist it, send on every attempt

findings.evidence: credit_account read-modify-write on balance, no lock or atomic increment, concurrent credits lose an update
findings.fix: UPDATE ... SET balance = balance + :amt, or SELECT FOR UPDATE

findings.evidence: debit_account read-modify-write with no lock and no WHERE balance >= amount guard, lost update and overdraft
findings.fix: UPDATE ... SET balance = balance - :amt WHERE balance >= :amt, zero rows means insufficient

findings.evidence: webhook_events.event_id TEXT with no UNIQUE (and nullable), no DB backstop for the app-side dedup
findings.fix: event_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE

findings.evidence: payments.external_ref TEXT with no UNIQUE, a redelivered event inserts a second payment row
findings.fix: UNIQUE constraint on external_ref

findings.evidence: correct_entry does entry.amount = new_amount, mutating a posted entry in place
findings.fix: append a linked reversing entry, never mutate

findings.evidence: post_entry appends one signed leg, no counter-leg, no shared transaction_id, no debit == credit check
findings.fix: two or more legs sharing a transaction_id, assert debits == credits

findings.evidence: LedgerEntry has only id, account_id, amount, kind, no transaction_id to group two legs, a journal can never balance
findings.fix: add transaction_id and per-leg direction

findings.evidence: post_entry bumps the cached store balance in a separate step, never derived from summing entries nor reconciled
findings.fix: derive balance from entries or update in the same atomic txn, plus a reconciliation job

findings.evidence: correct_entry writes account.balance = account.balance + delta directly, out of band from any entry sum
findings.fix: never mutate the stored balance directly, let it derive from entries

findings.evidence: LedgerEntry has no created_by, created_at, or reason/source, a posted movement cannot record who, when, or why
findings.fix: add created_by, created_at, reason (and idempotency_key)

findings.evidence: correct_entry changes amount and balance recording no actor, reason, or timestamp, no trail
findings.fix: represent the correction as an attributed append-only entry

findings.evidence: refund_in_original_currency reverses via convert(), assuming a lossless round-trip when the two legs use independently rounded rates (0.92 vs 1.087, not 1/0.92)
findings.fix: refund from the stored original amount and currency, never reconvert, expect A to B to A to drift

findings.evidence: convert() reads a rate from the mutable module-level RATES dict and returns only round(amount * rate, 2), the rate value, source, and as-of timestamp are never captured
findings.fix: store the conversion as an immutable fact (rate, source, as_of) alongside the amount

findings.evidence: settle_invoice overwrites the invoice total with the converted value and the currency with payout_currency, discarding the original amount and code
findings.fix: persist converted fields and keep original_amount and original_currency intact

findings.evidence: total_revenue does total += invoice total over USD, EUR, and MXN into one float with no currency guard
findings.fix: bucket per currency, never add differing currencies

findings.evidence: transactions_in_period uses at >= start and at <= end, both ends inclusive, so a txn on the shared month boundary lands in both adjacent months
findings.fix: use a half-open interval, at >= start and at < end

findings.evidence: ledger_entries.created_at TIMESTAMP without time zone, period bucketing then uses the server ambient zone
findings.fix: TIMESTAMPTZ, bucket at time zone the business zone

findings.evidence: daily_rate = annual_rate / 365, day-count baked in as a literal with no convention, wrong for 360-basis and leap years
findings.fix: read the day-count convention and compute the year fraction via a convention object

findings.evidence: days = round((end.timestamp() - start.timestamp()) / 86400), epoch-seconds diff over 86400, DST-naive
findings.fix: count calendar days on business-zone local dates

findings.evidence: invoices.issued_at TIMESTAMP without time zone, used for statement periods
findings.fix: TIMESTAMPTZ, derive periods in the business zone

findings.evidence: payments.received_at TIMESTAMP without time zone
findings.fix: TIMESTAMPTZ

findings.evidence: webhook_events.received_at TIMESTAMP without time zone
findings.fix: TIMESTAMPTZ

findings.evidence: sum_amounts: total = 0.0 then total += amount, sums money in a native float accumulator
findings.fix: accumulate in Decimal from strings or integer minor units

findings.evidence: total_all_pages pages with offset += page_size over live data, concurrent inserts or deletes skip or double-count rows
findings.fix: one SUM query in a snapshot, or a keyset cursor in a serializable txn

findings.evidence: total_all_pages cross-page accumulator is also a float (total = 0.0, total += sum_amounts), per-page subtotals combine in binary float
findings.fix: keep the running total in Decimal or integer minor units

findings.evidence: SALES_TAX_RATE = 0.0825 as a bare binary float, no exact representation, used in every multiply
findings.fix: Decimal('0.0825') or integer basis points (825)

findings.evidence: round_money uses float round(amount, 2) instead of Decimal.quantize, rounding an already-inexact binary intermediate
findings.fix: quantize a Decimal with an explicit mode

findings.evidence: invoice_tax_by_lines rounds per line (sum of round) while invoice_tax_on_total rounds once (round of sum), the two paths coexist with no reconciliation
findings.fix: one configured rounding level, route every path through it, assert sum(line_tax) == document_tax

findings.evidence: extract_tax_from_gross applies the rate to a tax-inclusive gross as if net (gross * rate), overstating tax so net + tax does not equal gross
findings.fix: tax = gross - gross/(1+rate)

findings.evidence: parse_amount(input: str) -> float: return float(input) on a request-body amount, a float-coercing parse with no strict grammar
findings.fix: validate a strict money grammar then Decimal(raw), never float()

findings.evidence: invoice_response json.dumps with total = from_minor_units(...) emits money as a bare JSON float and drops the currency
findings.fix: serialize money as a string decimal or integer minor units with a currency code

findings.evidence: account_balance returns integer cents while invoice_response returns decimal dollars, no canonical money shape and no currency
findings.fix: one canonical money shape (minor-unit int plus ISO 4217 currency) on every endpoint

findings.evidence: no property-based tests anywhere (no Hypothesis, @given, or st across all three test files), invariants like split conservation and balance == sum(entries) only spot-checked on single literals
findings.fix: add a Hypothesis suite generating totals and ratios and op-sequences to attack the invariants

findings.evidence: every fixture is a clean round value and divisors divide evenly, no fractional minor unit and no rounding mode ever pinned (passes identically under half-up and half-even)
findings.fix: use awkward amounts and odd divisors that force a rounding decision and assert the mode

findings.evidence: one happy 2-decimal currency (USD) only, no JPY (0 decimals) or BHD (3 decimals), no negative or refund case and no boundary magnitudes despite a refund path existing
findings.fix: parametrize a JPY, USD, BHD currency matrix, add a refund and negative case, and boundary values
